2603.24329.title: GameplayQA: A Benchmarking Framework for Decision-Dense POV-Synced Multi-Video Understanding of 3D Virtual Agents
2603.24329.paper_summary: Multimodal LLMs are increasingly deployed as perceptual backbones for autonomous agents in 3D environments, from robotics to virtual worlds. These applications require agents to perceive rapid state changes, attribute actions to the correct entities, and reason about concurrent multi-agent behaviors from a first-person perspective, capabilities that existing benchmarks do not adequately evaluate. We introduce GameplayQA, a framework for evaluating agentic-centric perception and reasoning through video understanding. Specifically, we densely annotate multiplayer 3D gameplay videos at 1.22 labels/second, with time-synced, concurrent captions of states, actions, and events structured around a triadic system of Self, Other Agents, and the World, a natural decomposition for multi-agent environments. From these annotations, we refined 2.4K diagnostic QA pairs organized into three levels of cognitive complexity, accompanied by a structured distractor taxonomy that enables fine-grained analysis of where models hallucinate. Evaluation of frontier MLLMs reveals a substantial gap from human performance, with common failures in temporal and cross-video grounding, agent-role attribution, and handling the decision density of the game. We hope GameplayQA stimulates future research at the intersection of embodied AI, agentic perception, and world modeling.
2603.24329.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被用作3D環境中自主代理的感知骨幹，從機器人技術到虛擬世界。這些應用要求代理能夠感知快速的狀態變化，將行動歸因於正確的實體，並從第一人稱的角度推理同時發生的多代理行為，而現有的基準測試並未充分評估這些能力。我們介紹了GameplayQA，這是一個通過視頻理解評估以代理為中心的感知和推理的框架。具體而言，我們以每秒1.22個標籤的速度密集標註多人3D遊戲視頻，並提供時間同步的狀態、行動和事件的並行字幕，這些字幕圍繞自我、其他代理和世界的三元系統結構，這是多代理環境的自然分解。基於這些標註，我們精煉了2400個診斷性問答對，這些問答對被組織成三個認知複雜度層次，並附有一個結構化的干擾者分類法，能夠對模型出現幻覺的地方進行細緻的分析。對前沿大型多模態語言模型的評估顯示出與人類表現之間存在顯著差距，常見的失誤包括時間和跨視頻的基準、代理角色的歸因，以及處理遊戲的決策密度。我們希望GameplayQA能夠促進未來在具身人工智慧、代理感知和世界建模交叉領域的研究。
2603.24329.author: Yunzhe Wang et.al.
2603.24329.authors: Yunzhe Wang, Runhui Xu, Kexin Zheng, Tianyi Zhang, Jayavibhav Niranjan Kogundi, Soham Hans, Volkan Ustun
